Index

All Classes|All Packages

S

sendAllMessages() - Method in class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
This method sends all public messages sent in the selected chatRoom on this day and sends private massages sent in the selected chatRoom on this day in case the client is their sender or receiver.
sendChatRoomsToClient() - Method in class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
This method sends list of names of currently existing chatRooms to connected client.
sendMessage(String) - Method in class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
This method sends String message to connected client
Server - Class in pjv.controller
This class contains methods where new instance of ServerSocket is created.
Server(int) - Constructor for class pjv.controller.Server
The Server class constructor.
server_constructor_test() - Method in class pjv.controller.ServerTest
 
ServerTest - Class in pjv.controller
 
ServerTest() - Constructor for class pjv.controller.ServerTest
 
ServerWindow - Class in pjv.view
This is the main class for this application.
ServerWindow() - Constructor for class pjv.view.ServerWindow
 
sessionFactory - Static variable in class pjv.utils.HibernateUtils
 
setChatRoomId(int) - Method in class pjv.model.ChatRoom
This method sets ID of ChatRoom instance.
setChatRoomName(String) - Method in class pjv.model.ChatRoom
This method sets name of ChatRoom instance.
setClient(Client) - Method in class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
This method sets Client instance of connected client.
setClientChatRoomId(int) - Method in class pjv.model.Client
This method sets ID of chatRoom of Client instance.
setClientId(int) - Method in class pjv.model.Client
This method sets ID of Client instance.
setClientUserName(String) - Method in class pjv.model.Client
This method sets username of Client instance.
setDateTime(LocalDateTime) - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method sets date and time when the message was sent.
setExitThread(boolean) - Method in class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
This method sets the value of variable which stores data whether client has closed the application.
setFirstInputCompleted(boolean) - Method in class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
This method sets value of variable which stores information whether first message with client data was already received from client.
setFromClientId(int) - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method sets ID of client who sent the message.
setFromClientName(String) - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method sets name of client who sent the message.
setIdMessage(int) - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method sets ID of Message instance.
setMessageText(String) - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method sets text of the sent message.
setServer(ServerSocket) - Method in class pjv.controller.Server
This method sets ServerSocket instance.
setSocket(Socket) - Method in class pjv.controller.Server
This method sets Socket instance.
setToChatRoomId(int) - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method sets ID of chatRoom in which the message was sent.
setToClientName(String) - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method sets name of client to whom the private message was sent.
setUp() - Static method in class pjv.controller.ServerTest
 
setUp() - Static method in class pjv.utils.HibernateUtilsTest
 
showAllClients(ActionEvent) - Method in class pjv.view.ServerWindow
This method shows all clients.
showClientsOfChatRoom(ActionEvent) - Method in class pjv.view.ServerWindow
This method shows clients of selected chatRoom.
start(Stage) - Method in class pjv.view.ServerWindow
This method sets snd shows scene of the primary stage.
start_server_and_delete_chatRoom_test() - Method in class pjv.controller.ServerTest
